closing_form.why: The prior WIP session's rejected list had for(;;) and shared-end-label but not do{}while(1) with break-out-of-loop for the ret0-sentinel exit. That shape gives GCC a distinct ret0 landing (target's separate .L80089F30: addu $v0,$zero,$zero) rather than the shared cross-jump-tail-merged block the plain goto/label form produced, closing the residual null-check placement gap.
